translations.en: Finn
translations.zh: 芬恩

translations.en: a sly looking fellow, dressed in rags.
translations.zh: 一個滿臉狡黠、身著破衣的男子。

translations.en: "Hello my good
translations.zh: 「你好，我親愛的

translations.en: wo
translations.zh: 女

translations.en: man!"
He glances around quickly, to see if anyone seems to be listening. "I'm Lord British. But don't tell anyone."
translations.zh: 他迅速掃視四周，確認無人偷聽。「吾乃不列顛王。但切莫告訴任何人。」

translations.en: "I'm in @disguise so I can mingle with the @commoners."
translations.zh: 「吾正在@disguise喬裝，以便混入@commoners平民之中。」

translations.en: "I'm pretending to be a @beggar. That way nobody will suspect who I really am. Here, give me a few coins to keep anyone from getting suspicious."
translations.zh: 「吾正假扮@beggar乞丐。如此一來，無人會起疑心。來，給我幾枚硬幣，免得旁人起疑。」

translations.en: "Of course, nobody would dare say anything bad about me to my face. Nobody except @Chuckles, anyway."
translations.zh: 「當然，沒有人敢當面說我壞話。除了@Chuckles以外，沒有任何人。」

translations.en: "But as a beggar, people will tell me just about anything!"
translations.zh: 「但以乞丐身份，人們什麼都肯告訴我！」

translations.en: "He's in disguise too, you know. He's really @Blackthorn."
translations.zh: 「他也在喬裝，你知道嗎。他其實是@Blackthorn黑棘。」

translations.en: "I decided banishment was too harsh for him, so I brought him back and made him my jester."
translations.zh: 「吾認為放逐對他太嚴酷，便把他召回，封為吾的弄臣。」

translations.en: "The real Chuckles is tied up in my @dungeons. I got tired of him making fun of my nose."
translations.zh: 「真正的笑笑被關在吾的@dungeons地牢裡。吾受夠了他嘲弄吾的鼻子。」

translations.en: "I'm Lord British, and I can do whatever I want to!"
translations.zh: 「吾乃不列顛王，吾要做什麼便做什麼！」

translations.en: "Very convincing, don't you think? I made it myself."
translations.zh: 「很逼真吧，你不覺得嗎？這是吾親手製作的。」

translations.en: "I've got forty million crowns. Not to mention my secret bank @accounts."
translations.zh: 「吾有四千萬金幣。更別提吾秘密的銀行@accounts帳戶。」

translations.en: "I told you not to mention that!"
translations.zh: 「吾說過不許提那件事！」

translations.en: "I'm really Lord British. I can prove it to you. I know all of the @eight @mantras, and where the @runes are, too!"
translations.zh: 「吾真的是不列顛王。吾可以向你證明。吾知曉全部的@eight @mantras真言，也知道@runes符文所在！」

translations.en: "I killed a @dragon when I was eight, you know. With my bare hands, too!"
translations.zh: 「吾八歲時曾殺死一條@dragon龍，你知道嗎。還是徒手殺的！」

translations.en: "He was a big one - but he hadn't reckoned with the likes of me. I was a @tough kid."
translations.zh: 「那條龍很大——但他沒料到會遇上吾這號人物。吾那時可是個@tough硬漢少年。」

translations.en: "I was so tough he couldn't chew me, and he had to spit me out. That's when I killed him."
translations.zh: 「吾太難嚼了，牠只好把吾吐出來。就是那時吾把牠殺了。」

translations.en: "Ok, here are the mantras:
translations.zh: 「好吧，真言如下：
translations.note: Finn 假稱知曉八大真言

translations.en: justice - do
translations.zh: 正義 - do

translations.en: compassion - re
translations.zh: 慈悲 - re

translations.en: honor - mi
translations.zh: 榮譽 - mi

translations.en: valour - fa
translations.zh: 勇氣 - fa

translations.en: spirituality - so
translations.zh: 靈性 - so

translations.en: humility - la
translations.zh: 謙遜 - la

translations.en: sacrifice - ti
translations.zh: 犧牲 - ti

translations.en: Gosh, wouldn't you know it? The Mantra of Honesty slips my mind at the moment..."
translations.zh: 哎呀，你瞧，誠實的真言這會兒偏偏忘了……」
translations.note: 故意忘記誠實真言的笑點

translations.en: "I'll tell you this, because you look like someone who can keep a secret."
translations.zh: 「吾告訴你這件事，因為你看起來是個守口如瓶的人。」

translations.en: "I sent out eight fake runes to all the lords, to fool everybody."
translations.zh: 「吾向所有諸侯分送了八枚假符文，以欺騙眾人。」

translations.en: "I put all the real ones in a little box, and hid it under my throne."
translations.zh: 「吾把所有真符文放進一個小盒子，藏在王座之下。」

translations.en: "You can't see it there, because I turned it @invisible!"
translations.zh: 「你看不見它，因為吾已將它變成@invisible隱形了！」

translations.en: "A clever trick, or my I'm not @Finn!"
translations.zh: 「多妙的把戲，否則吾就不是@Finn了！」

translations.en: "Oh, that's just the name I'm pretending to go by. Of course you know I'm really Lord British."
translations.zh: 「哦，那只是吾假扮時用的名字。當然你知道吾其實是不列顛王。」

translations.en: "I can see you're too smart to be fooled by this disguise."
translations.zh: 「看來你太聰明了，不會被這套喬裝給騙到。」

translations.en: "If you need me later, I'll be at the Blue Boar, disguised as the tavernkeeper."
translations.zh: 「若你之後需要我，我會在藍野豬酒館，喬裝成客棧老闆。」

translations.en: "But I won't admit to it there if you ask me... Too many people that might hear."
translations.zh: 「但在那裡你問我，我也不會承認……知道的人太多了。」

translations.en: You see Shamino smiling - an unusual sight.
translations.zh: 你見夏米諾在微笑——此乃罕見之景。

translations.en: Noticing your attention, he says "Perhaps there's a little of Lord British in us all."
translations.zh: 他察覺到你的目光，說道：「也許我們每個人心中，都有一點不列顛王的影子。」

translations.en: "Oh, I know all about that. But I think you'd be better off if you learned about it on your own."
translations.zh: 「哦，這件事吾知之甚詳。但吾認為你最好自己去了解。」

translations.en: Do you give him any money?
translations.zh: 你要給他錢嗎？

translations.en: "Broke, are you? Well, come by after I'm done with this disguise,*
translations.zh: 「身無分文？那好，等吾結束這次喬裝之後再來，*

translations.en: and I'll give you a loan from the royal @treasury."
translations.zh: 吾會從皇家@treasury國庫借給你一些。」

translations.en: How much do you give?
translations.zh: 你要給多少？

translations.en: You don't have that much.
translations.zh: 你沒有那麼多錢。

translations.en: He takes the money. "Good. I'll get this back to you later."
translations.zh: 他接過錢。「很好。吾之後會還給你的。」

translator_notes: 芬恩是詐騙乞丐，謊稱自己是不列顛王。全篇喜劇幽默口吻。真言音節（do/re/mi/fa/so/la/ti）保留 ASCII。故意忘記誠實真言為笑點，妥善保留。
